FACTUAL IMPRECISION: The Feb 10 2026 outage paragraph states 'T-Systems VPN-Zugangsdienst parallel zum IBM-IDP-Ausfall für mehrere Stunden nicht verfügbar war'. Web sources (borncity.com) confirm the IBM Frankfurt data center smoke detector was the root cause for the entire outage. The T-Systems VPN was affected as a downstream consequence of the IBM data center shutdown — not as a separate, parallel independent failure. The phrasing implies two independent failures rather than one root cause.
TI-Gateway availability 'seit 2023 (Zulassungen)': unverified but plausible.
IPSec technical parameters, mTLS for TI-Gateway: consistent with gematik specifications.
All 4 Quellen URLs point to gematik sources expected to be live.
articles.fixInstructions: Correct the Feb 10 2026 outage description: the IBM Frankfurt Rechenzentrum smoke-detector shutdown was the single root cause that took down both IBM's sektoraler IDP and the T-Systems VPN access service (which was co-located or dependent on the same infrastructure). Change the sentence to: 'Dies zeigte sich am 10. Februar 2026, als der IBM-Rechenzentrumsausfall in Frankfurt gleichzeitig den IBM-sektoralen IDP und den T-Systems VPN-Zugangsdienst für mehrere Stunden lahmlegte.' Cross-reference with Telematikinfrastruktur.md for consistency.
